name: Gorilla Technology Group Inc. Ordinary shares
summary: Gorilla Technology Group Inc. is a global provider of AI-enabled edge video analytics solutions, offering a range of video intelligence, IoT security, and cybersecurity products and services. The company's solutions are utilized across various industries, including smart cities, manufacturing, retail, and healthcare; its headquarter is in Taipei, Taiwan. Gorilla Technology Group Inc. focuses on developing and deploying advanced technologies to enhance security and operational efficiency.
